benefits.description: Mixing BPC-157 and TB-500 with NAD+ and GHK-Cu eliminated injection burn entirely; no pain during or after injection

side_effects.description: NAD+ subcutaneous injections cause significant burning pain lasting hours; GHK-Cu also burns, possibly more than NAD+

protocol_notes: Using GLOW protocol (BPC-157 + TB-500) mixed with GHK-Cu and NAD+. Mixes peptides into same vial: 3ml added to 75mg GHK vial, 2ml added to 6mg/6mg BPC/TB vial, 1ml of GHK moved to BPC/TB vial. Injects 20 units per dose, yielding 15 doses at 1670mcg GHK-Cu / 400mcg BPC-157 / 400mcg TB-500 per dose. Added ~500mcg BPC/TB combo to 300mg NAD+ to eliminate burn. Also takes zinc 30mg, 2-3x per week to balance copper from GHK-Cu. Reports no noticeable subjective benefits from NAD+ yet; considers it a long-term DNA repair compound.
